items.title: OKC Thunder signs Brooks Barnhizer, Josh Dix and Otega Oweh to two-way deals
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: OKC Thunder signs Brooks Barnhizer, Josh Dix and Otega Oweh to two-way deals Yahoo Sports

items.title: The Oklahoma City Thunder have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Brooks Barnhizer, a league sourced told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Oklahoma City Thunder have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Brooks Barnhizer, a league sourced told @spotrac.com.

Barnhizer will be a restricted free agent this offseason.
